draw.io GraphViewer (viewer-static.min.js)
Source: https://viewer.diagrams.net/js/viewer-static.min.js
Repository: https://github.com/jgraph/drawio

This file is vendored to enable offline (air-gap) preview of .drawio
diagrams via the make_preview_html.py script without requiring internet
access or the draw.io desktop CLI.
